name: Damnation
oracleText: Destroy all creatures. They can't be regenerated.

name: Incinerate
manualNotes: Covered by Ice Age role audit.
oracleText: Incinerate deals 3 damage to any target. A creature dealt damage this way can't be regenerated this turn.

name: Mana Tithe
oracleText: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {1}.

name: Ponder
oracleText: Look at the top three cards of your library, then put them back in any order. You may shuffle. Draw a card.

name: Corrupt
oracleText: Corrupt deals damage to any target equal to the number of Swamps you control. You gain life equal to the damage dealt this way.
